tasks.label: Build Firmware
args: source .venv/bin/activate && source env.sh && west build -p always app -d app/build

tasks.label: Build Tests
args: source .venv/bin/activate && source env.sh && export ZEPHYR_TOOLCHAIN_VARIANT=host && west build app/tests -d app/tests/build -b native_sim -p always

tasks.label: Run Unit Tests
args: source .venv/bin/activate && source env.sh && export ZEPHYR_TOOLCHAIN_VARIANT=host && west build app/tests -d app/tests/build -b native_sim -p always && app/tests/build/zephyr/zephyr.exe

tasks.label: Code Checker (CodeChecker)
args: source .venv/bin/activate && source env.sh && west build -p always app -d app/build && CodeChecker analyze -o .codechecker_reports --config .codechecker.json app/build/app/compile_commands.json && CodeChecker parse --config .codechecker.json .codechecker_reports

tasks.label: Format Code
args: source .venv/bin/activate && find app/src app/include app/tests/src app/tests/hardware/src \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' \) -exec clang-format -i {} \;

tasks.label: Check Formatting
args: source .venv/bin/activate && find app/src app/include app/tests/src app/tests/hardware/src \( -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' \) -exec clang-format --dry-run --Werror {} +

tasks.label: Incremental Build
args: source .venv/bin/activate && source env.sh && west build app -d app/build
